name: Jay Gilligan
cooked: hey just checking in to see if you have any new thoughts- has the project reached its end or are you still pursuing different ideas? i’m pretty surprised that more players from the warehouse discovery last year haven’t reached the secondhand market yet. a few are selling here and there but not many at all, prices are really up.
